title: Reversed columns from right to left?
excerpt:
Greetings, 
I wonder if there is a way to reverse columns to be consistent with the Right to Left language direction, such as Arabic language. I’d like to make a translated version of the boards. 
Please advise. 
Regards…

posts.author: Nabaleh (Mokhtar Nabaleh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings,
I wonder if there is a way to reverse columns to be consistent with the Right to Left language direction, such as Arabic language. I’d like to make a translated version of the boards.

Please advise.
Regards,

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t believe that’s an option currently. I’d recommend putting this on Feature Requests though
